attempt: Transfer TICKET44's lesson: a bounded numerical or visual pattern is useful only after the proposed feature measure survives exact counteredge extraction and a future-lift theorem.

bounded_result.discarded_shortcut: finite zero-template feature score treated as RH
bounded_result.retained_target: A horizon-independent positive-kernel feature measure excludes every off-critical zero lift.
bounded_result.counterexample_target: an off-critical lift that has identical feature score or a reverse positive-kernel constraint

obstruction: The current artifact names a better proof target, but it does not close the infinite theorem or produce a certified counterexample.
candidate_theorem: A horizon-independent positive-kernel feature measure excludes every off-critical zero lift.
next_experiment: Extract zero-template feature counteredges before promoting any kernel-measure candidate.
claim_boundary: No riemann proof and no certified riemann counterexample.
